Pizza.name: Futuristic Margherita
Pizza.description: A classic neon-infused classic! Abundant premium mozzarella, fresh vine-ripened tomatoes, and aromatic basil pesto oil drizzle.

Pizza.name: Neon Pepperoni Blaze
Pizza.description: Double layer of fiery, crispy pepperoni over strings of sharp cheddar and garlic alfredo sauce.

Pizza.name: Cyber Veggie Supreme
Pizza.description: Vibrant medley of sweet corn, crispy capsicum, red onions, mushrooms, and sliced black olives on thin crust.

Pizza.name: Galactic BBQ Chicken
Pizza.description: Tender smoked grilled chicken tossed in sticky smoky BBQ sauce, sweet corn, and red onions with bubbling liquid cheddar.
